description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The front features a wide driveway leading to a garage, with a manicured lawn and a large tree on one side. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and contains a patio area with outdoor furniture, surrounded by lush greenery and flowering trees. Large windows line the rear facade, providing ample natural light to the interior living spaces. The side view reveals a modest window and the continuation of the fence, while the overall layout emphasizes privacy and outdoor living. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a combination of grass, shrubs, and mature trees enhancing the residential appeal.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, brick and light exterior walls, a front driveway, and a landscaped backyard with a patio and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, main door, and a large tree on the right lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, a small window, and the backyard patio area with visible fencing and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a patio with outdoor furniture, and lush landscaping within a fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the fence, more trees, and the driveway leading to the front.
